overall.description: Static cinematic shot from the video game Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic industrial waterfront with a river, shipping docks, a red bridge, and a dense cyberpunk skyline featuring skyscrapers and smoke stacks under clear morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront with shipping docks and cyberpunk city skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cyberpunk cityscape from a fixed vantage point over the river

entered.detail: calm murky green water filling the foreground of the scene
red-painted pedestrian or vehicle bridge spanning across the middle distance
wooden and metal dock platforms along the right riverbank
stacked colorful shipping containers on the dockside
dense cluster of futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers with neon accents
multiple smoke stacks emitting white steam into the sky
large distinctive building with an arching structure connecting towers
industrial cranes near the dock area

segments.scene_description: A completely static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront. The foreground features calm river waters, while the right side shows industrial docks with shipping containers. A red bridge spans the middle distance, leading toward a dense skyline of glass skyscrapers, smoke stacks, and a distinctive arched megastructure under clear morning skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, expansive panoramic view of a futuristic industrial waterfront bathed in clear morning light. It begins with a focus on the calm river waters in the foreground, which lead the eye toward the right where industrial docks and shipping containers line the shore. The perspective then extends across the middle distance to a prominent red bridge that connects the waterfront to the urban core. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a dense cyberpunk skyline dominated by glass skyscrapers, towering smoke stacks, and a massive arched megastructure under a bright, cloudless sky.
